evaluator_notes: Scoped to Topic 2 browser/interface evidence. The new audit/specs documents, Solidity invariant tests, @custom:spec NatSpec tags, symbolic/static-analysis workflows, foundry.toml CI profile, and most audit/wiki pages are useful for other topics but do not count as interface E2E coverage unless they define UI journeys or run the interface suite. The complete-suite aggregate cap at 6.5 is non-binding because the mean is already below it. D4 moved from 0.3 to 0.0 under a strict reading of the failure-axis anchor, but the -0.3 delta is below the regression threshold.
